example_tasks: Create a matrix for vendor comparison
Align team goals with quarterly objectives
Create a table of contents for the report
Arrange meeting schedule for the week
Design a grid layout for the dashboard
Group related tasks into a project
Build a lookup table for configuration
poor_matches: Send an email to the team
reasoning: The icon represents structure, grids, or data organization. It is useful for tasks involving sorting, categorizing, or designing layouts, but it is too abstract for general task management.
